chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 170 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 03.12.2024 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioners after arguing the matter at some length, under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is not opposed by learned Assistant AG. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
